race.description: Dynamic Finance Brokers - Tasmanian St Leger
race.comment: DISTRUSTFUL AWARD (1) brings a 1L defeat in the Launceston Cup. Was just nudged out in the Hobart Cup prior. A Group winner who deserves to break back, and this is his chance. VINO NOVELLO (8) is an improving galloper stepping up to a staying trip for the first time. Won a 64 comfortably over 2100m last time and tumbles in weight. Draws to advantage and the leading hoop replaces the apprentice. No surprise if he threatens. GOLDEN PROPHET (7) has a key gear switch and can go better. Got too far back in the Launceston Cup but would need to find plenty to challenge the above pair. FAST THINKER (3) also found the Cup too rich but he was a big middle-distance winner here prior.
